description: Benchmark dataset cho retrieval trong chatbot da muoi. Gom policy + cong dung + bao quan.

documents.title: Tac dung loc khong khi
documents.content: Den da muoi Himalaya co tac dung loc khong khi, ion hoa khong gian song, giup trung hoa buc xa dien tu tu cac thiet bi dien tu.

documents.title: Cai thien giac ngu
documents.content: Anh sang do cam tu den da muoi giup thu gian, ho tro co the de ngu hon, thich hop dat trong phong ngu.

documents.title: Ho tro ho hap
documents.content: Den da muoi co the ho tro nguoi hen suyuen va viem mui di ung thong qua moi truong khong khi sach hon khi su dung deu dan.

documents.title: Phong thuy mau ho phach
documents.content: Theo phong thuy, den da muoi mau cam ho phach mang nang luong Tho, thuong dat o phong khach hoac goc tai loc.

documents.title: Phong thuy mau hong
documents.content: Den da muoi mau hong thuong duoc dat o phong ngu, tao cam giac am ap va nhe nhang, phu hop cho khong gian thu gian.

documents.title: Vi tri dat den
documents.content: Vi tri dat den nen o phong ngu, phong khach, ban lam viec hoac phong thien. Dat gan thiet bi dien tu de giam anh huong buc xa.

documents.title: Cach bao quan
documents.content: Khong de den o noi am uot vi muoi co the chay nuoc. Lau bang khan kho, tranh nuoc. Bao quan kin khi khong su dung.

documents.title: Chinh sach van chuyen
documents.content: Mien phi ship noi thanh cho don tu 1.000.000d. Don duoi muc nay tinh phi theo khu vuc. Giao hang 2-5 ngay lam viec.

documents.title: Chinh sach doi tra
documents.content: Ho tro doi tra trong 7 ngay neu san pham loi do nha san xuat hoac hu hong khi van chuyen va con day du phu kien.

documents.title: Chinh sach bao hanh
documents.content: Bao hanh bong den va day dien 3 thang. Khoi da muoi tu nhien khong ap dung bao hanh nut vo do va dap hoac am nuoc.

documents.title: Huong dan su dung
documents.content: Dat den o noi kho rao, tranh nuoc. Bat den 1-3 gio moi ngay. Lau bang khan kho, khong dung khan uot.

den da muoi co giam buc xa dien tu khong
dat den trong phong ngu co giup ngu ngon khong
nguoi hen suyuen dung den da muoi co tot khong
dat den da muoi o dau la tot nhat
phong khach nen chon den mau nao theo phong thuy
bao quan den da muoi the nao de khong chay nuoc
khi khong dung den thi can lam gi
